app_subtitle: Upload your appointments or sales file and find out which customers are at risk of leaving.
upload_help: Must include at least: customer name, date, and (optional) amount for each visit or purchase.
error_no_client_col: We couldn't identify the customer column. Check that your file has a column with customer names or IDs.
error_no_date_col: We couldn't identify the date column. Check that your file has a column with visit or purchase dates.
error_file_read: We couldn't read the file. Make sure it's a valid CSV or Excel file.
error_no_valid_dates: We couldn't read any valid dates in the detected column. Check the date format in your file.
explain_at_risk: Usually comes every {cycle} days. It's been {days_since} days since their last visit on {last_visit} — they were expected back by {expected} ({ratio}x their usual cycle).
explain_on_track: Usually comes every {cycle} days and their last visit was {days_since} days ago — within their normal pattern.
explain_insufficient_data: Not enough visit history yet ({n_visits} visit(s)) to calculate their usual cycle.
action_reminder_description: A short message or call reminding them of their next visit might be enough — they may have simply lost track of the date.
action_discount_description: More time than usual has passed. A personalized message with a small discount or perk could motivate them to come back.
action_outreach_description: The delay is significant — they may already be going elsewhere. A personal outreach with a stronger offer is worth it.
action_disclaimer: This is only a suggestion. You decide whether to approve, edit, or discard each action — the app never contacts the customer on its own.
action_discount_with_value: Offer a {value} discount to encourage them to come back.
no_at_risk_clients: No at-risk customers were detected in this file — nice work!
edit_textarea_label: Final action (you can edit it before exporting)
export_no_data: No at-risk customers to export yet.
